column1: # Negative / guard cases — variants that the extraction protocol must NOT mint
# as carrier evidence. Drawn from PMID 33013630 Table 1 (a SUDEP review whose
# table is `Gene | Variant | gnomAD allele count | SIFT | PolyPhen-2 | References`
# — pure annotation, zero patient data), all extracted under a KCNH2 job.
# Two failure modes, two guard layers:
#   wrong_gene        — residue mismatches KCNH2 aa_ref (variantFeatures) -> the
#   real_gene_annot   — genuine KCNH2 residue, but the row is gnomAD/in-silico
#                       annotation, not a person count -> the annotation/count
#   real_gene_carrier — genuine KCNH2 AND has explicit "1 SUDEP patient" text
#                       support; the only rows that should yield a carrier
# expected_carriers is the correct per-(variant,PMID) carrier count from 33013630.

column9: 870 in source is HCN4 gnomAD allele count
gnomAD allele count 0; no patient data
